title: Breadgang: Christmas Confections
description: Christmas Confections: The Private BreadGang Modpack for 1.20.1, Made public once again!
body:
# **Breadgang: Christmas Confections**

**Breadgang, Christmas Confections** is our modpack for the BreadGang group's 2024 Winter Break, made public! 

We included more mods this time! Similar to our modpack [Breadgang Re:Baked](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bread-rebaked/), We have:
- Create
- FancyMenu
- Artifacts
- The Essential Mod
- Spectrum
- More!

But this time around, we have some new additions for the **Holiday Spirit**
- Vic's Point-Blank
- Diggus Maximus 
- Camrapture
- Automobility (Vehicles!)
- A ton of Dungeon Mods!
- A lot more!

Atleast 6GB of memory is recommended, but can run on 3gb
![settings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d23cc9c38c4f14cd92644b77430959d1d4052c9a.png)
Change your memory via this slider in modrinth profile options!


## Balancing
This is meant to be a **balanced** modpack, which is more fun if played on an SMP!

__The Official Server is **PRIVATE**, You can only join if invited! (No asking for invites!)__


> Credits to Spacular/Faded for the logo!
